title: 为什么软银新的 400 亿美元贷款指向 2026 年 OpenAI IPO
content: 华尔街巨头摩根大通和高盛正在向这家日本企业集团提供为期 12 个月的无担保贷款。
original_title: Why SoftBank’s new $40B loan points to a 2026 OpenAI IPO
original_content: Wall Street giants JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs are extending a 12-month, unsecured loan to the Japanese conglomerate.

title: 用于主动用户-LLM 交互的隐式回合策略优化

original_title: Implicit Turn-Wise Policy Optimization for Proactive User-LLM Interaction

title: Cohere 推出专门用于转录的开源语音模型
content: 该模型相对较轻，只有 20 亿个参数，适合那些想要自行托管它的人与消费级 GPU 一起使用。目前它支持 14 种语言。
original_title: Cohere launches an open source voice model specifically for transcription
original_content: Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages.

title: Mistral 发布了用于语音生成的新开源模型
content: 该模型允许企业构建用于销售和客户参与的语音代理，使 Mistral 与 ElevenLabs、Deepgram 和 OpenAI 等公司直接竞争。
original_title: Mistral releases a new open source model for speech generation
original_content: The model, which lets enterprises build voice agents for sales and customer engagement, puts Mistral in direct competition with the likes of ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and OpenAI.

title: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能
original_title: What's New in Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release

title: 软银获得 400 亿美元贷款以深化 OpenAI 合作伙伴关系
content: 软银已获得 400 亿美元的过桥贷款，以加强对人工智能的关注，并扩大与 ChatGPT 背后的公司 OpenAI 的关系。此举标志着新的推动......
original_title: SoftBank secures $40B loan to deepen OpenAI partnership
original_content: SoftBank has secured a 40 billion bridge loan as it sharpens its focus on artificial intelligence and expands its relationship with OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT. The move signals a renewed push ...

title: OpenClaw 特工可能会因内疚而陷入自我破坏
content: 在一项对照实验中，OpenClaw 特工被证明容易恐慌并且容易受到操纵。当人类点燃煤气时，它们甚至会禁用自己的功能。
original_title: OpenClaw Agents Can Be Guilt-Tripped Into Self-Sabotage
original_content: In a controlled experiment, OpenClaw agents proved prone to panic and vulnerable to manipulation. They even disabled their own functionality when gaslit by humans.

title: OpenAI 放弃了另一个支线任务：ChatGPT 的色情模式
content: 这只是这家人工智能初创公司上周放弃的几个副项目中的最新一个。
original_title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
original_content: It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

title: 综合混合训练：扩展 RAG 之外的参数化知识获取
